description.p: MassiveEQ is beta software providing parametric, graphic, per-ear, and convolution equalization for Arch Linux playback devices.
Beta 2 adds click-to-create graph bands, precise keyboard editing, responsive filter switches, and additional editor safety checks.
Beta 1 adds native real-time DSP, device assignments, level-matched profile comparisons, synchronized visual and text editing, convolution, and optional StatusNotifier controls.
Public beta tested on Arch Linux x86_64 with niri, PipeWire 1.6.8, WirePlumber 0.5.15, Bluetooth A2DP, and analog stereo output.
